Product Description
Edge Rainbow
This Sophisticated smooth leather-look notebook with rainbow printed page edge offers a bit of fun for your journaling. The EDGE notebooks are not just good-looking, they are highly practical to boot.
Features:
Available in A5 size
240 pages
70gsm white paper
Ruled layout
Expandable inner pocket
Rainbow edging
